tools.name: golangci-lint
tools.scope: full project, excludes test/, third_party, builtin, examples

linting.notes: golangci-lint version 2 config with lax exclusions for generated code. CI uses golangci-lint-action with latest version.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses httptest for HTTP mocking, k8s client-go for Kubernetes API mocking
testing.notes: Unit tests use -race flag for race detection. E2E tests require a Kubernetes cluster (kind) and are excluded from PKGS variable. Tests run with -count=1 to disable caching.

ci.notes: Publish job requires all checks to pass. E2E tests run in kind v0.30.0 cluster with custom config at test/e2e/kind-config/kind-config.yaml. Go version 1.25.8 used in CI.

build.notes: Build creates _output/kube-rbac-proxy binary. Supports crossbuild for multiple architectures. Uses CGO_ENABLED=0 for static binary. Version info embedded via ldflags.

conventions.test_naming: Test* functions (Go standard), subtests use t.Run()
conventions.import_style: Standard Go import grouping: stdlib, external, internal
conventions.notes: All Go files require license header (Apache 2.0). Generated files exempt from license check.

test_commands.notes: All unit tests passed (8 packages tested)
Requires kind cluster - not validated in basic container

container_recipe.notes: golangci-lint requires version 2.11.4+ to support Go 1.25.7. E2E tests need KUBECONFIG and a running Kubernetes cluster.

results.notes: Build completed successfully, binary created at _output/kube-rbac-proxy
All Go files have proper license headers
All unit tests passed across 8 packages with race detection enabled

validation.summary: install OK, build OK, check-license OK, lint OK (0 issues), test-unit OK (all passed), generate OK

gaps: E2E tests require Kubernetes cluster (kind) and cannot be validated in basic container
No coverage threshold configured in codebase
Generate command modifies files - CI checks for uncommitted changes with git diff --exit-code
